blockers.description: REQUIREMENTS.md: PROV-01 in body but missing from Traceability table
blockers.workaround: PROV-01 is a LATER-MILESTONE requirement (GHCR + Docker), not a Phase 2 deliverable -- add it to the traceability table manually when convenient; not a Phase 2 blocker.

decisions.decision: origin/main restored to pre-Phase-2 backup 98da97a; all v0.0.1 work lives on gsd/v0.0.1-greenfield-rebuild @ a9056be (pushed). Backup ref origin/backup/main-pre-dogfood @ 98da97a is now redundant.
decisions.rationale: The push-to-main was a temporary vehicle to exercise the live dogfood canary; user chose to restore main.

decisions.decision: @actions/cache pinned 6.2.0 (latest, human-approved over baked 6.1.0 default with too-new/SUS verdict surfaced and accepted); @actions/core 3.0.1.
Cross-OS lockfile must be regenerated in Linux (Docker node:24, node_modules masked), never via npm install on this Windows host.
decisions.rationale: A Windows workspace-scoped install prunes the @emnapi WASM-fallback optional deps that Linux npm ci requires; caused all-jobs-red CI.

next_action: Run /gsd:secure-phase 2 (let the gsd-security-auditor agent produce 02-SECURITY.md; do NOT self-certify inline even on a clean-looking short-circuit). Then /gsd:validate-phase 2, then /gsd:extract-learnings 2 + the global_learnings bridge.
context_notes: Phase 2 fully built, reviewed, and verified end-to-end incl. a real GitHub Actions cache HIT. Only the three mandatory retroactive audits remain. STATE.md shows current_phase:3, but do NOT start Phase 3 -- finish Phase 2's audits first. Each audit MUST be reached by its dedicated agent (secure-phase -> gsd-security-auditor; validate-phase -> gsd-nyquist-auditor), never authored inline by the orchestrator. If any audit surfaces a BLOCKER (open high+ threat, or an uncovered requirement), treat it as a verification gap: /gsd:plan-phase 2 --gaps -> execute -> re-audit, before extract-learnings.
